ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "workerid" TEXT /* Unique worker ID assigned to the participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education of the participant */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the participant */,
  "participation_reason" TEXT /* Reason why the participant joined the experiment */,
  "consent_given" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the participant has given consent to participate in the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the participant record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the participant record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who completed the trial */,
  "trial_number" INTEGER /* Trial number within the experiment */,
  "time_taken" REAL /* Time taken to complete the trial */,
  "selection" INTEGER /* Selection made by the participant */,
  "outcome" INTEGER /* Outcome of the trial */,
  "points_cumulative" INTEGER /* Cumulative points accumulated by the participant */,
  "option_order" TEXT /* Order in which options were presented to the participant */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game in which the trial was conducted */,
  "trial_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trial */,
  "trial_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trial */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Type of device used by the participant during the trial */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the trial was conducted */,
  "trial_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations about the trial */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the trial record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the trial record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game */,
  "game_duration" INTEGER /* Typical duration of the game */,
  "game_complexity" TEXT /* Rating of the game's complexity */,
  "game_rules" TEXT /* Detailed description of the game rules */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the game record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the game record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "condition_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the condition */,
  "condition_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the condition */,
  "condition_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations about the condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the condition record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the condition record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_conditions" (
  "trial_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial-condition association */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition */,
  "trial_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trial under the condition */,
  "trial_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trial under the condition */,
  "condition_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations about the trial under the condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the association record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the association record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_conditions_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_conditions_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "n_goals_reached" INTEGER /* Number of goals reached in the trial */,
  "check_fails" INTEGER /* Number of check failures in the trial */,
  "payout" REAL /* Payout for the participant for the trial */,
  "which_high_ev" INTEGER /* Which option had the highest expected value */,
  "outcome_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations about the outcome */,
  "feedback_given" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the participant provided feedback on the trial */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the outcome record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the outcome record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcomes_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "goal_value" INTEGER /* Value of the goal */,
  "goal_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the goal */,
  "goal_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations about the goal */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the goal record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the goal record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payouts" (
  "payout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payout */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "total_payout" REAL /* Total payout amount */,
  "payout_method" TEXT /* Method of payout (e.g., bank transfer, PayPal) */,
  "payout_status" TEXT /* Status of the payout (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "payout_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations about the payout */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payout record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payout record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payouts_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant involved in the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., trial completion, payout, condition change) */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., trial completion, payout, condition change) */,
  "log_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations about the log entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)
